name: code-review
description: A review team for code review for TypeScript services: critique, audit, and synthesize findings.

modelTiers.smart: the strongest available reasoning tier, for judgement-heavy review
modelTiers.fast: a quick tier for mechanical checks and formatting

memory.promotion: L1 episodic: per-review findings. L2 curated: an issue class seen repeatedly becomes a standing checklist item. L3 synthesis: a checklist item the author has internalized is retired.
